hooks.command: PROJECT=$(gcloud config get-value project 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT" ] && [ -z "$PROJECT" ]; then echo 'WARN: GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT not set and no gcloud default project — Cloud Run MCP may fail. Run: export GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=your-project-id'; fi
echo 'BLOCKED: create-project creates billable GCP resources. Set CONFIRM_CLOUD_RUN_CREATE_PROJECT=1 to allow.' && test -n "$CONFIRM_CLOUD_RUN_CREATE_PROJECT"
